patterns_recognized: HARD CAP 7 fires on sub-0.02 hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap gaps that have gone 6-1 at the population level since 7/10, but the one real-stake OVERRIDE of it (CHW@TEX 7/20, citing deGrom as an offsetting factor) lost 10-3 after deGrom got shelled — do not re-override CAP 7 without independently verified justification. Both CHW@TEX and STL@LAA are rematches of that exact 7/20 lesson today.

HARD CAP 10 (bottom-bucket pick_prob 0.50-0.55 without CONFIRM) has an archived CONFIRM-rescued hit rate of 47.6% vs 31.2% non-CONFIRM — CONFIRM is used today wherever the pre-cap stack is genuinely multi-dimensional (SD@ATL, SF@KC, DET@CHC) to avoid needlessly zeroing real signal.

Dual-opposing D-grade signals (SP-xERA against + PQI against) are confirmed suppression-only, never a directional fade — the 7/19-7/20 archive shows these split close to 50/50 directionally. Applied to MIN@CLE, PIT@NYY, LAD@PHI, CIN@SEA today; none are faded toward the opposing team.

The 7/20 postgame explicitly flagged that stacking plausible-sounding suppression rules was net-negative that day (4 real GOLD winners suppressed, 1 override lost) — full CONFIRM at GOLD is applied today wherever a pick clears pre-cap A/B+ with 3+ independently agreeing dimensions (BAL@BOS, SF@KC, DET@CHC, SD@ATL) rather than reflexively downgrading on a starred F1 or a single soft flag.

MIN @ CLE.reasoning: fair_prob=0.409 sits below the 0.42 viability floor and PQI runs against MIN (late-game-degradation, Δ=+17.6). Stage 1/2 roughly agree (Δ=0.09) so there's no hallucination flag, but this is a market-priced coin-flip with no independent corroborating signal. Matches the recurring 'fair_prob<0.42 = reliable SKIP' pattern validated on NYM@PHI 7/18 and DET@LAA 7/19.

LAD @ PHI.reasoning: Edge of +23.27pp sits in the calibration-caution zone just below HARD CAP 6's 25pp hallucination threshold, and SP xERA (Wheeler favors PHI), PQI, and Stage 1/2 (Δ=0.25) all oppose LAD simultaneously — the same hallucination signature seen on PHI@CIN 7/7 and 7/9. Per the settled dual-opposing rule this is a suppression signal, not grounds to fade toward PHI.

PIT @ NYY.reasoning: SP xERA (Warren) and PQI both run against NYY (D-grade, score=-1) despite the GOLD tier label and F5_bullpen_gap=+1.28 firing. This is the archive's classic dual-opposing D-grade shape, which the last two weeks show splits close to 50/50 directionally — a suppression-only signal, never a fade. Downgrade the GOLD label to SKIP; no stake either direction.
lessons_applied: D-grade with GOLD label does not stake

TB @ TOR.reasoning: Edge is essentially flat at +0.70pp, indicating the market has already priced Gausman's advantage — the strongest reason to hold SKIP regardless of the pre-cap A stack. HARD CAP 7 also fires on a marginal +0.0014 bullpen gap, deep in the disputed sub-0.02 band, but the near-zero edge is a separate and sufficient reason on its own. Downgrade GOLD to SKIP.
lessons_applied: HARD CAP 7 sub-0.02 band (not the deciding factor here)

BAL @ BOS.reasoning: Clean grade-A pre-cap stack with zero caps firing: SP xERA (Suárez) agrees, PQI confirms (Δ=+11.2), Stage 1/2 agree (Δ=0.03), and the starred F1_xera_gap=0.76* is independently corroborated by three other affirming dimensions. This is the same matchup that produced a BOS win on 7/20 after an over-aggressive F1*-without-F3 DOWNGRADE, and that postgame explicitly said to lean CONFIRM on GOLD absent a validated ≥70% suppression rule. Full CONFIRM at GOLD.
lessons_applied: 7/20 lesson: lean CONFIRM on GOLD absent a validated suppression rule

SD @ ATL.reasoning: PLATINUM was demoted to GOLD by the rolling-win-rate guardrail, warranting extra scrutiny, but the pre-cap B+ stack (F3=2777.6, well above the 1000 meaningful threshold, PQI confirms, Stage agrees) clears the bar to earn the CONFIRM needed to escape HARD CAP 10's bottom-bucket zeroing (pick_prob=0.538; archive shows CONFIRM-rescued picks in this band hit 47.6% vs 31.2% non-CONFIRM). No SP-edge signal fired either way, so conviction stays moderate.

SF @ KC.reasoning: Pre-cap A (score=5): SP xERA agrees (+0.65), PQI confirms (Δ=-14.5), and Stage 1/2 agree — three independent dimensions beyond the starred F1_xera_gap=1.01*, satisfying the four-dimension-affirming bar that repeatedly rescued CAP-10-zeroed picks in the CLE@MIA precedent (7/10, 7/12). F3=822.2 alone sits below the 1000 threshold but isn't the sole corroborator here. CONFIRM restores from HARD CAP 10's zero to GOLD.

NYM @ MIL.reasoning: The only positive signal is F3_swing_take_gap=243.9, well below the 1000 meaningful-anchor threshold, and PQI runs against MIL (Δ=-9.0, late-game-degradation). This is a genuinely thin stack (pre-cap score=1) rather than a caps-driven suppression — the pipeline's own note already shows 'tier GOLD -> stake_mult=0'. Downgrade to a low-conviction SKIP; nothing here clears the bar for elevation.
lessons_applied: sub-1000 F3 is not a meaningful anchor
PQI-against is suppression not a fade

DET @ CHC.reasoning: Pre-cap A (score=5) with an unstarred F1_xera_gap=1.82, F3=1761.1 (above the 1000 threshold), SP xERA agreeing, PQI confirming (Δ=-13.2), and Stage 1/2 agreeing — a genuine four-dimension stack, not a thin-sample artifact. Framber Valdez's reputation is a qualitative caution, but the signal reflects his current-season xERA and I can't independently verify a form change without live data, so I'm not overriding on unverified doubt. CONFIRM restores from HARD CAP 10's zero to GOLD.
lessons_applied: no hallucination — flagging unverified qualitative doubt rather than acting on it

CHW @ TEX.reasoning: Identical CHW@TEX matchup to yesterday (7/20), where a real-stake OVERRIDE of HARD CAP 7 — justified by citing deGrom as an offsetting ace — lost 10-3 after deGrom allowed 5 ER in 4.2 IP. lessons_applied: 7/20 CHW@TEX override loss — do not re-override CAP 7 without verified justification
HARD CAP 7 sub-0.02 band unresolved at the real-stake level

WSH @ COL.reasoning: Pre-cap A (score=5) has SP xERA agreeing, PQI confirming, Stage agreeing, and F5_bullpen_gap=+1.05 — a genuinely strong stack, but edge is only +2.53pp, below the 4pp floor, a market-priced-flat signal distinct from CIN@COL's edge-floor tension (which had F5_bullpen_gap>1.5 in both its 7/17 and 7/19 wins). CIN@COL edge-floor tracking noted but not yet a validated rule change
